allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps=p.get\('dependencies',{}\); devdeps=p.get\('devDependencies',{}\); print\('typeorm in deps:', 'typeorm' in deps\); print\('typeorm in devDeps:', 'typeorm' in devdeps\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('dep:', 'tsconfig-paths' in p.get\('dependencies',{}\)\); print\('devDep:', 'tsconfig-paths' in p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in p['scripts'].items\(\) if 'start' in k or 'prod' in k]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in p['scripts'].items\(\) if 'migrat' in k]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('deps:', list\(p.get\('dependencies',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:10]\); print\('devDeps tsconfig:', 'tsconfig-paths' in p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)\)")
